_inspectorSnowReport.Report: Saturday February 28 5:35 a.m. Weekend fun is in full effect! Lifts begin spinning at 8:00 a.m. — arrive early to cruise some cord. Our grooming crew has been working hard since the last storm, packing down more than 30 of our 60+ open trails. The mountain is skiing fast right now. Please check your speed and keep your eyes peeled for icy spots and grooves. And of course, other skiers and riders. Both terrain parks will be open today along with our new terrain-based learning park on Easy Street. Designed for new skiers and riders, the mini-park is a great way for beginners to get their bearings before heading higher on the hill. Check out the gentle rollers and low angled bowl our park crew has sculpted. The west face of Honeycomb Canyon is open and patrol is looking to open limited east face terrain today, conditions permitting. Expect great views and variable conditions when you drop in. The skies will be mostly cloudy today with temperatures rising into the low 40s. Your days at Solitude just got better with the Solidaze Rewards Challenge — scan your Ikon Pass pass for prizes and a chance to win a pass for next season.
